win_condition: At game end (when deck is exhausted or a player reaches target score), player with highest total points wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player who was storyteller fewer times wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Storyteller Points
categories.description: Total points earned while acting as storyteller (0/3 scoring per round from guess outcomes).

categories.label: Guesser Points
categories.description: Points earned by correctly guessing the storyteller card (3 each success).

categories.label: Vote-Received Bonus
categories.description: 1 point for each vote your submitted card receives when you are not storyteller.
